places.name: Berliner Unterwelten (Subterranean Berlin)
places.description: A tour of underground Berlin takes you through WWII air raid shelters and tunnels used to smuggle people out of East Germany.

places.name: Liquidrom
places.description: This futuristic German spa allows visitors to float in a pool of salt water while zoning out to underwater techno.

places.name: Monsterkabinett
places.description: A whimsical and twisted animatronic monster tour beneath the streets of Berlin.

places.name: Berlin Botanical Garden
places.description: Started as a kitchen garden, now the second largest botanical garden in the world.

places.name: Tajikistan Tearoom
places.description: A slice of central Asia in the middle of Berlin.

places.name: Pergamon Museum
places.description: The most visited, and possibly most controversial, museum in Germany.

places.name: Design Panoptikum
places.description: A surreal museum of extraordinary industrial objects.

places.name: Burgermeister
places.description: Where once there was a train station bathroom, there is now this German burger joint.

places.name: Café Strauss
places.description: Residents of Berlin take their coffee and cake in one of the city’s most restful spaces: a cemetery.
